title: The Locked Door
content: Emma was visiting her grandmother's old house during the weekend. While exploring the second floor, she noticed a small wooden door at the end of the hallway. She tried to open it, but it was locked. Her grandmother smiled and said she had lost the key many years ago. Curious, Emma searched the attic and found an old key inside a dusty box. It fit the lock perfectly. Behind the door was a tiny room filled with old books, paintings, and family photographs. There was no great treasure, but Emma discovered stories about her family that she had never heard before.
